subject.title: Thin biopolitical systems output replay fixture
subject.context: Evidence replay fixture for incomplete systems diagnostics
subject.question: How should the app diagnose a biopolitical output that under-populates the expanded systems map?
subject.executive_thesis: A thin systems output may still contain a recognizable biopolitical topic, but it is not publication-ready when incentives, technology mediation, behavioral engineering, resistance, and power redistribution are missing.

items.mechanism: Attention becomes measurable through app use.

actions: Optimize retention without explaining governance incentives
items.interpretation: The system frames personalization as utility while leaving the extraction logic under-specified.

items.name: Diagnostics force a stronger systems map
early_signals: quality warnings appear in review and export
disproven_if: the export shows no diagnostic warnings
items.rationale: A replay fixture should make incomplete systems output observable and testable.

items.claim: The systems map is intentionally incomplete for diagnostic testing.
items.source_note: Internal evidence replay fixture used as a source-grounded regression artifact to prove missing-field warnings are exported.
items.counter_evidence: A complete fixture should not trigger these warnings.

items.assumption: Missing systems fields should be visible in both review and exported HTML.
items.disproving_test: Import and export the fixture without warning markers.

quality_gate.next_improvement: Populate incentives, technology mediation, behavioral engineering mechanisms, resistance, and power redistribution across all eight axes.

interests.name: Diagnose under-specified life governance
interests.rationale: The fixture intentionally leaves the expanded systems structure incomplete.

actors.name: Users and governed subjects
actors.rationale: The population is present but not fully mapped across systems.

tools.name: Diagnostic replay import
tools.rationale: The replay fixture activates quality diagnostics without adding product scope.

narrative.name: Output quality must be machine-checkable
narrative.rationale: The app should expose incomplete systems logic before export.

results.name: Warnings become export evidence
results.rationale: Incomplete fields should reduce quality score and create warning markers.

feedback.description: Replay fixture reveals missing systems logic
feedback.rationale: The test can repeatedly verify review/export diagnostics.
